author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
Pardon Our Pixie Dust | Monstropolis, Magic of Disney Animation & Disney Magic
In the latest episode of Pardon Our Pixie Dust, we're taking you behind the construction walls at the Magic of Disney Animation and the Monsters Inc. world of Monstropolis at Disney's Hollywood Studios as well as a trip to Canada for the Disney Magic dry dock!

🦺 *Behind-the-Walls with Imagineers*
Pardon Our Pixie Dust goes behind the construction walls to give you an update on the magic being brought to life by Walt Disney Imagineering!

*Follow Walt Disney Imagineering*

*Follow Disney Live Entertainment*

🌐 *Learn More About WDI*
Walt Disney Imagineering is the creative powerhouse behind the magic of Disney’s global destinations. From concept to creation, our Imagineers blend storytelling, art, science, and technology to craft unforgettable experiences for families around the world. Find out more → https://sites.disney.com/waltdisneyimagineering/
